title: Thrymskvidha: Thor in a Wedding Dress
description: Thor's hammer is stolen by a giant who demands Freyja as bride. Thor dresses as Freyja and retrieves it.
introduction: Thor's hammer is stolen by a giant who demands Freyja as bride. Thor dresses as Freyja and retrieves it.

translation.text: Wrathful was Thor when he awoke and found his hammer gone.
